selected_patch: Wrap exact titles/proper names in quotes and include common alternate spellings/diacritics or short ORvariants where relevant (e.g. "Félix Salinas" OR "Felix Salinas"). Use simple boolean OR only for compact alternates; do not inject guessed people/answers.

When the question mentions a place/county or historic entity, expand the hop2 query with compact alternate name variants and any date-range tokens from the question. Add short forms like "County" vs "Co." and swapped-name variants separated with OR (e.g. NameA OR NameB or NameA/NameB). Also include any explicit year-span found in the question as a separate keyword (e.g. 1848–1870). Keep the additions keyword-like and brief.

When generating hop2 queries, prefer compact keyword sets: emit exact multiword phrases in quotes and join alternate spellings/names with OR (e.g. "Phrase A" OR "Phrase B" OR A_B). Keep tokens short and keyword-like; avoid full-sentence phrasing.
